'''Vondri Deeq''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Chef/Legends|chef]]. He was the perfectionist and irritable head chef of the [[Three Jetties Gourmet Restaurant]] in [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]], a establisment serving only seafood from [[Bartyn Gourmet Delicacies]], always cooked under the personal supervision of Deeq.
